changes: Fixed some issues with engine shutdown in the game.
Replaced Tolk and CrossSpeak with Prism for better cross-compatibility.
Added the ability to choose different speech backends, for example SAPI or One Core on Windows. Credits to @kalahami for the feature.
Added the ability to disable startup logo of the game.
Added the ability to choose different voices for the speech backend, if the backend supports it. For example, on One Core or SAPI, you can choose a different voice and set the speech rate.
Added the option to interrupt screen-reader speech. This makes new spoken messages interrupt previous ones. Credits to @kalahami for the feature.
serverChanges: Updated server room model and explicit race finish events for players.
Fixed bugs with race finish events.
